title: Allocate 5-minute time slots with mandatory 3-minute gaps between flights
description: The system shall automatically allocate 5-minute time slots for each flight with a mandatory 3-minute gap between consecutive slots.
rationale: To ensure safe separation between flights and prevent collisions.
business_value: Improves operational safety and reduces the risk of air accidents.

source.description: As an air traffic controller, I need the system to allocate 5-minute time slots for flights with a mandatory 3-minute gap between consecutive slots so that ensure safe separation.

acceptance_criteria: There is a 3-minute gap between the end of one slot and the start of the next
Slots are automatically assigned based on scheduling rules
postconditions: Flights are scheduled with adequate time separation
Safety protocols are enforced during flight allocation
functional_constraints: The system must allocate slots in a manner that complies with air traffic control regulations
The allocation algorithm must handle multiple flights concurrently without overlap

non_functional_requirements.performance: The system should complete slot allocation within 10 seconds for each flight request
non_functional_requirements.scalability: Must support up to 10,000 concurrent flight requests without performance degradation
non_functional_requirements.usability: Error messages must be clear and actionable

edge_cases: What happens if a flight is canceled during the allocation process?
How should the system handle flights that are delayed and need to be rescheduled?
What if multiple flights have the same estimated time of arrival?

interfaces.name: Flight Information API
interfaces.description: The system will use this API to retrieve flight schedule data and update slot allocations.

interfaces.name: Flight Schedule Database
interfaces.description: Stores flight schedules, allocated time slots, and other relevant information.

test_cases.description: Verify that each flight receives a dedicated 5-minute slot.
test_cases.expected_result: All flights have been assigned non-overlapping 5-minute slots.

test_cases.description: Check if there is a mandatory 3-minute gap between consecutive time slots.
test_cases.expected_result: There is a 3-minute gap between the end of one slot and the start of the next for all flights.

test_cases.description: Test system performance under peak hour load.
test_cases.expected_result: The system completes slot allocation within 10 seconds for each flight request, with a 99.9% uptime during peak hours.
